title: Diemant's Cherry Leaves
description: Randomized cherry leaves textures with different ratio of green to pink, which makes large quantities of leaves look better.
body:
![Diemant's Cherry Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ea708766ded18e50f19d85cf1b8175c7c7b02d2.png)

# Diemant's Cherry Leaves
## Have you ever felt that vanilla cherry leaves are too same-y? 
Well, this resource pack aims to diverse large quantities of cherry leaves by randomizing textures with different retio of green to pink. If you encounter any issues with this pack, please submit them using GitHub.
